title: Tasty Greek Pepper Fritters
description: Crispy, plant-based fritters bursting with Greek herbs and sweet bell peppers, ideal for a quick solo dinner.
instructions: In a bowl combine chickpea flour, oregano, cumin, paprika, sea salt, and black pepper.
Add diced peppers, chopped parsley, and water; mix until a thick batter forms.
Heat olive oil in a deep skillet over medium heat until shimmering.
Drop spoonfuls of batter into hot oil, frying each for 3-4 minutes per side.
Flip fritters with tongs, cooking until golden and crisp on both sides.
Remove fritters with a slotted spoon and place on paper towels to drain excess oil.
Serve hot, optionally drizzled with lemon yogurt dip or a squeeze of fresh lemon juice.
Enjoy as a lively solo dinner or share with friends.
